ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the signal on the board */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the signal (e.g., Output, Input, I/O) */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Signal type (e.g., GPIO_Output, GPIO_Input, GPIO_Analog) */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the signal */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the board the signal is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal's purpose or function */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the signal */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the signal */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the signal is active */,
  "fault_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for fault detection */,
  "last_fault_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last fault detected */,
  "parent_signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent signal (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_signal_type FOREIGN KEY ("signal_type") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_label FOREIGN KEY ("label") REFERENCES signal_labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the board */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the board */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the board */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the board was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the board was last updated */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the board */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the board */,
  "last_firmware_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last firmware update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the board is active */,
  "last_active_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last active state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "signal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type (e.g., GPIO_Output, GPIO_Input, GPIO_Analog) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "is_analog" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the signal type is analog */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the signal type */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., CHARGE_PWR_BRD, FAULT_PWR_BRD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "is_system_label" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the label is a system-defined label */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the label can be customized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_number" INTEGER /* Number of the position on the board */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the board the position is on */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "is_reserved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the position is reserved */,
  "reserved_for" TEXT /* Description of the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_positions_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the configuration is for */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the configuration is the default setting */,
  "is_overridden" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the configuration has been overridden */,
  "overridden_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who overridden the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_configurations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the status is for */,
  "status_value" TEXT /* Current value of the signal */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was recorded */,
  "is_fault" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the status is a fault */,
  "fault_description" TEXT /* Description of the fault */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the fault has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_status_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the log is for */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., change, fault) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "event_value" TEXT /* Value of the signal during the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the log entry is important */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the log entry is generated by an automated process */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent signal */,
  "child_signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child signal */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., depends_on, controls) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the relationship is optional */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the relationship is required */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_relationships_child_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_relationships_parent_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access level is the default */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access is enabled */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the access entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the session is active */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the device model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device model */,
  "last_firmware_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last firmware update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the device model is active */,
  "last_active_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last active state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device instance */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device model */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device instance */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device instance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device instance (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instance was last updated */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next maintenance due */,
  "is_maintenance_required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if maintenance is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_instances_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES device_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_boards" (
  "device_board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device board */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device instance */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the board */,
  "slot_number" INTEGER /* Slot number of the board in the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device board was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device board was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the board is active */,
  "last_active_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last active state */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next maintenance due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_boards_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_boards_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES device_instances ("instance_id")
)
